author: tmiychao
content:
<@&857649635274915900>  Good Monday all! 

We are entering another week slowly concluding second phase of EPF and moving to execution. I see lot's of great projects and great contributions in your updates, keep them coming! Reminder to submit them both to github and our weekly thread for visibility - https://discord.com/channels/595666850260713488/1528722077031465010/1528722081385156700
And of course I will see you today at 3PM UTC for the regular standup call, come to share your progress and meet others there. 

This week we continue projects presentations with another Office Hours call. There are many people signed up, much more than the first one so it might spill over to next week as well. https://github.com/eth-protocol-fellows/cohort-seven/issues/210

Today I am back in the office, as I mentioned previous week I was traveling and less available. Please don't send me public pings in middle of the weekend, especially after I was informed you I am out last week. Use these as a last resort if I really missed your message after a week or so. As you know we had changes in the organization and I am handling all of the responsibility myself now. I am starting to catch up to your updates and messages today, back in the office! 🙂
